pages.text:
**Notarial Deed**

**Meester Els Vandenberghe**
Notary Public
Knokke-Heist, Belgium
Date: 18 June 1998

---

**Purchase Contract (Koopakte / Acte Authentique de Vente)**
**Document ID: purchase_002**

---

**PARTIES**

**Seller:**
North Sea Residence BVBA, a private limited liability company established under the laws of Belgium,
having its registered office at [insert address], registered with the Crossroads Bank for Enterprises under
number [insert number], represented in this deed by its managing director, [insert name of managing
director], duly authorized for the purpose of this transaction.

**Buyer:**
Hendrik Janssen, born on 15 March 1948, residing at [insert address], hereinafter referred to as "the
Buyer".

---

**RECITALS**

**WHEREAS**, the Seller is the lawful owner of the property described herein, located at Zeedijk 45, 8300
Knokke-Heist, Belgium, identified by the cadastral reference Knokke-Heist, 2nd division, section C,
number 1187/K, hereinafter referred to as "the Property".

**WHEREAS**, the Buyer wishes to purchase the Property from the Seller as a private investment and
holiday property, and the Seller agrees to sell the Property to the Buyer under the terms and conditions
set forth in this deed.

**WHEREAS**, the parties have agreed upon the financial terms of the transaction, which will be
executed by certified bank transfer.

---

**ARTICLE 1: OBJECT OF SALE**

The Seller hereby sells, transfers, and conveys to the Buyer, who accepts, the Property, which consists of
an apartment located on the first floor of the building situated at Zeedijk 45, Knokke-Heist, Belgium. The
Property includes:

1. The exclusive right of use and enjoyment of the apartment, characterized by its living area of
approximately [insert square meters] m², comprising [insert description of the apartment layout, e.g.,
two bedrooms, a living room, a kitchen, and a bathroom].
2. The right to use the common parts of the building, including but not limited to the entrance hall,
staircases, and gardens, in accordance with the rules of co-ownership as established in the building
regulations of the condominium.
3. The corresponding share in the common areas, as determined by the co-ownership title, which is
proportional to the surface area of the apartment.

---

**ARTICLE 2: PRICE**

The total purchase price for the Property is fixed at ONE HUNDRED FIFTY THOUSAND EUROS (EUR
150,000). The Buyer agrees to pay this amount in full by certified bank transfer to the Seller’s designated
account within [insert timeframe, e.g., within 30 days from the execution of this deed].

---

**ARTICLE 3: TRANSFER OF OWNERSHIP**

The ownership of the Property shall be transferred to the Buyer upon full payment of the purchase price.
The Buyer shall enjoy all rights and obligations associated with the Property from the date of execution of
this deed.

---

**ARTICLE 4: CONDOMINIUM/COMMON PARTS**

The Property is sold in co-ownership and is subject to the applicable regulations governing the
condominium. The Buyer acknowledges receipt of the condominium regulations and undertakes to
comply with the rules set forth therein. Common charges and property taxes shall be prorated between
the parties as of the date of the transfer of ownership.

---

**ARTICLE 5: WARRANTIES**

The Seller warrants that the Property is free of any encumbrances, liens, or third-party rights, except for
those disclosed in this deed. The Seller guarantees the validity of the title and the absence of any
ongoing legal disputes concerning the Property.

---

**ARTICLE 6: URBAN PLANNING**

The Buyer acknowledges that the Property is built in conformity with the urban planning regulations
applicable at the date of this deed. The Buyer accepts the Property in its current condition and shall bear
the risk of any future urban planning modifications.

---

**ARTICLE 7: COSTS**

All costs associated with the execution of this deed, including notary fees, registration fees, and any
applicable taxes, shall be borne by the Buyer, unless otherwise agreed.

---

**CLOSING ATTESTATIONS**

In witness whereof, the parties have executed this deed in the presence of the undersigned notary, who
certifies that the parties have appeared before me and have declared their intention to enter into this
transaction.

**SIGNATURE BLOCK**

Done in Knokke-Heist, Belgium, on the date first above written.

**For the Seller:**
North Sea Residence BVBA,
Represented by: [Insert name of managing director]
[Signature]

**For the Buyer:**
Hendrik Janssen
[Signature]

**Witnessed by:**
Meester Els Vandenberghe
Notary Public
[Signature]

---

**This document is executed in duplicate, one for each party.**

---

This concludes the formal notarial deed for the purchase contract as requested.

**SIGNATURE BLOCK**

Done in Knokke-Heist, Belgium, on the date first above written.

**For the Seller:**
North Sea Residence BVBA,
Represented by: [Insert name of managing director]
[Signature]

**For the Buyer:**
Hendrik Janssen
[Signature]

**Witnessed by:**
Meester Els Vandenberghe
Notary Public
[Signature]

---

---
